title: Uruguayan Meat Bake
description: A sour and pillowy Uruguayan dish featuring thyme, wood-fired-bake, and keto-friendly ingredients, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, thyme, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Transfer the meat mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the sour cream and eggs until smooth.
Pour the sour cream mixture over the meat mixture in the baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella over the top of the sour cream mixture.
Bake the dish in the preheated wood-fired oven for 35 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
